narrative: U.S.-Iran hostilities and energy shock risks drive a geopolitical risk premium as the dollar firms on rising yields — DXY +0.22%; gold lower -0.89%; equities -0.12%; VIX 15.9. USD/JPY holds at 162.42, supported by a 275bp OIS carry advantage, though a -1.37 moderate put skew in 25d RR suggests hedging against an intervention-led reversal. NZD/CHF bilateral divergence (+1.49% vs -0.66%) remains the dominant G10 theme as RBNZ hiking bias contrasts with SNB's 0.0% hold. Watch ECB Rate Decision on July 23.
